summary: Added pure `hasSimplicityVeto(findings)` to bin/lib/synthesize.mjs that detects [simplicity veto] tags. Wired it into the multi-review path in bin/lib/run.mjs (used by both build-verify and full-stack flows) so a 🔴 simplicity finding explicitly forces FAIL on top of the existing any-🔴-FAILs behavior. Added unit tests covering empty/null inputs, veto present, plain [simplicity], non-simplicity 🔴, parsed merged output, and immutability.
